languages.text: {n}Железным скелетам не ведома усталость, и обычная тактика изматывания оказалась провальной. Немало зарковцев закончили свои налеты на когтях ксеносов или растянутыми поверх металлических ребер. Меровский полк заплатил тяжелую, кровавую цену за победу.{/n}

{n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Железным скелетам не ведома усталость, и обычная тактика изматывания оказалась провальной. Немало зарковцев закончили свои налеты на когтях ксеносов или растянутыми поверх металлических ребер. Меровский полк заплатил тяжелую, кровавую цену за победу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

{n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

{n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

languages.text: {n}鉄骨の骸は疲れを知らず、相手の消耗を狙ういつもの戦法は通用しなかった。ザルコビアンは異形の爪に貫かれ、金属の肋骨に伸ばされて攻撃を止めた。メロフ連隊は勝利の代償として、多くの血と犠牲を払った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 鉄骨の骸は疲れを知らず、相手の消耗を狙ういつもの戦法は通用しなかった。ザルコビアンは異形の爪に貫かれ、金属の肋骨に伸ばされて攻撃を止めた。メロフ連隊は勝利の代償として、多くの血と犠牲を払った。

languages.text: {n}Los esqueletos de hierro son inmunes al cansancio, por lo que las tácticas de desgaste habituales no funcionaron. Muchos zarkovianos acabaron atravesados por las garras de los xenos o adornando algún costillar metálico. El precio en sangre de la victoria del regimiento de Merov fue muy elevado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los esqueletos de hierro son inmunes al cansancio, por lo que las tácticas de desgaste habituales no funcionaron. Muchos zarkovianos acabaron atravesados por las garras de los xenos o adornando algún costillar metálico. El precio en sangre de la victoria del regimiento de Merov fue muy elevado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}铁骷髅们不知疲倦，常规的消耗战术全然无效。许多扎尔科夫人要么被异形利爪贯穿，要么被挂在了敌人那冰冷的金属肋骨上。梅罗夫军团为胜利付出了惨重而血腥的代价。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}铁骷髅们不知疲倦，常规的消耗战术全然无效。许多扎尔科夫人要么被异形利爪贯穿，要么被挂在了敌人那冰冷的金属肋骨上。梅罗夫军团为胜利付出了惨重而血腥的代价。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eisenskelette kennen keine Müdigkeit und die übliche Taktik, einen Feind aufzureiben, schlug fehl. Viele Merovianer wurden von Xenosklauen aufgespießt oder über metallene Rippen gespannt. Das Merov-Regiment bezahlte einen blutigen Preis für seinen Sieg.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eisenskelette kennen keine Müdigkeit und die übliche Taktik, einen Feind aufzureiben, schlug fehl. Viele Merovianer wurden von Xenosklauen aufgespießt oder über metallene Rippen gespannt. Das Merov-Regiment bezahlte einen blutigen Preis für seinen Sieg.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yorgunluk nedir bilmeyen demir iskeletlerin rakibi yıpratmaya yönelik sıradan taktikleri başarısız oldu. Birçok Zarkovlunun saldırısı, zeno pençeleriyle delinerek ya da metal kaburgaların üzerine gerilerek son buldu. Merov Alayı, zafer için ağır ve kanlı bir bedel ödedi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yorgunluk nedir bilmeyen demir iskeletlerin rakibi yıpratmaya yönelik sıradan taktikleri başarısız oldu. Birçok Zarkovlunun saldırısı, zeno pençeleriyle delinerek ya da metal kaburgaların üzerine gerilerek son buldu. Merov Alayı, zafer için ağır ve kanlı bir bedel ödedi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les squelettes de fer ne connaissaient pas la fatigue. Face à eux, les tactiques consistant à épuiser un adversaire ne fonctionnaient pas. Beaucoup de Zarkoviens terminèrent leur assaut embrochés sur les griffes des xénos ou écartelés sur leurs côtes métalliques. Le régiment de Merov paya un prix fort et sanglant pour la victoire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Iron skeletons do not know fatigue, and the usual tactics for wearing down one's opponent failed. Many Zarkovians ended their attacks pierced by xenos claws or stretched over metal ribs. The Merov Regiment paid a heavy, bloody price for victory.{/n}
